title: The Great Killing
actors: Takayuki Akutagawa, Kôtarô Satomi, Chôichirô Kawarasaki
plot: A Shogunate Elder connives to rule Japan by making his puppet, the Shogun's brother Tsunashige, the next Shogun. The best strategist in Japan, Yamaga, leads a plot to stop the Elder, but his cabal is betrayed and most of the consp...
